headline: Ford’s Dividend Yield Rises Above 5% After the Crash: Time to Buy F Stock?
summary: Ford's dividend yield has risen above 5% after the recent fall. The stock looks like a good buy now for yield-seeking investors, given its reasonable valuations.

raw.headline: Ford’s Dividend Yield Rises Above 5% After the Crash: Time to Buy F Stock?
raw.summary: Ford's dividend yield has risen above 5% after the recent fall. The stock looks like a good buy now for yield-seeking investors, given its reasonable valuations.

headline: PSE and ChargeScape launch Washington’s first demonstration using EVs to power residential homes
summary: Cutting-edge technology demonstration could further strengthen grid reliability, turning electric vehicles into a backup power sourceBELLEVUE, Wash., March 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Puget Sound Energy (PSE) and ChargeScape have announced testing of new vehicle-to-home (V2H) technology enabling electric vehicles to power homes during power outages, together with partners Ford, Kia and Wallbox. headline: GM CFO Shrugs Off Imminent Gas Price Worries
summary: Soaring gas prices could pose significant challenges to Detroit's carmakers, but General Motors doesn't see any immediate changes to consumer car buying habits, the company's chief financial officer said Wednesday.

raw.headline: GM CFO Shrugs Off Imminent Gas Price Worries
